name: VWAP Stochastic Mean Reversion
edge_hypothesis: VWAP (Volume-Weighted Average Price) represents institutional fair value — the average price weighted by volume, showing where the most capital has transacted. When price deviates below VWAP, it is 'cheap' relative to where volume has traded; when above, it is 'expensive'. This creates natural mean-reversion gravity. Stochastic K in oversold territory (<20) or overbought territory (>80) confirms that the deviation has reached an extreme likely to snap back. Together: VWAP identifies the fair-value anchor, Stochastic times the entry at extremes. This is a pure ranging-regime play — the universal profit base where every ACCEPT strategy performs. Both conditions are zone-based (continuous), ensuring reliable signal frequency. First system test of VWAP_D as a primary signal generator.

variants.name: vwap_stoch_mr_v1_8to1
variants.description: Core thesis: price below VWAP + oversold Stochastic = mean-reversion long. Price above VWAP + overbought Stochastic = mean-reversion short. Both conditions are zone-based for reliable signal frequency. 8:1 R:R — the proven sweet spot.

components.notes: Volume-Weighted Average Price — institutional fair-value anchor. Price vs VWAP measures deviation from volume-weighted mean. First system test as primary signal.
Stochastic K — oscillator extremes (<20 oversold, >80 overbought) time mean-reversion entries at deviation peaks.
ATR-based position sizing and R:R framework.

variants.name: vwap_stoch_mr_v2_tight
variants.description: Tighter Stochastic thresholds (15/85) to select only the deepest mean-reversion extremes. Tests whether selectivity improves PF by filtering out shallow pullbacks that reverse too early. Same 8:1 R:R.

variants.name: vwap_stoch_mr_v3_10to1
variants.description: Extended 10:1 R:R (15x ATR TP). If VWAP mean-reversion captures extended snapback moves, wider TP captures the full reversion. Tests whether mean-reversion moves are large enough for 10:1 payoff.

components.notes: Extended 15x ATR TP for full mean-reversion capture.

indicator_roles.baseline: VWAP_D — Volume-Weighted Average Price. Institutional fair-value anchor where most capital transacted.
indicator_roles.confirmation: STOCHk_14_3_3 — Stochastic K oscillator. Zone-based extremes time mean-reversion entries.
indicator_roles.volume_volatility: ATR_14 — position sizing and R:R framework.
